overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy, neon-lit urban plaza at night. The environment features brutalist concrete architecture, scattered debris, and transitions from a quiet bench area to a busy transit station and finally to a street with moving traffic.

events.description: passing blue cylindrical utility building on the right
approaching wall with large AELSTROM graffiti signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through foggy plaza past green and yellow benches

entered.detail: green painted wooden bench with graffiti on the backrest
yellow concrete bench with integrated lighting underneath
small cylindrical utility structure painted blue with dark roof
concrete wall with large white AELSTROM text graffiti
dark silhouette of tree visible through fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a foggy urban plaza with teal-colored pavement. The camera passes green and yellow benches on the left while approaching a blue cylindrical building and a wall with AELSTROM graffiti on the right. Sparse pedestrians are visible in the distance through the heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with scattered pedestrians and street lighting

events.description: entering area with higher density of scattered pedestrians
approaching large concrete overpass structure ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza with scattered groups of pedestrians visible through fog

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and conversing near street light

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete overpass with linear lights underneath
tall pole with bright white LED array lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving through a more open plaza area with moderate crowds of pedestrians scattered throughout. Street trees and tall LED streetlights become prominent. The camera approaches a massive concrete overpass structure while the blue building and benches recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station entrance under concrete overpass

events.description: moving underneath the overpass structure, becoming partially covered
approaching NCART station entrance with glowing teal neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass toward the NCART transit station entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack walking ahead toward station entrance

entered.detail: glowing teal neon sign reading NCART above station entrance
transit station entrance with glass doors and illuminated interior
scattered garbage and debris accumulated near light pole

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the massive concrete overpass, entering a semi-covered area. The NCART station entrance becomes visible ahead with its distinctive teal neon signage. A pile of trash sits near a light pole, and pedestrians walk toward the transit entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with moving traffic and hotel ahead

events.description: vehicles moving along the multi-lane road to the right
blue neon HOTEL sign becomes visible through fog in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along street sidewalk with moving traffic visible on the right

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving along the road parallel to the pedestrian path

entered.detail: large blue neon sign spelling HOTEL on building facade
cars driving on the multi-lane road separated by railing
palm trees lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass area, the scene opens to a street with moderate traffic moving on the right. The camera walks along the sidewalk past palm trees while a blue neon HOTEL sign becomes visible through the fog ahead. The NCART station recedes behind as vehicles pass by on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a foggy urban plaza that gradually transitions into a bustling city street. It begins on teal-colored pavement, passing green and yellow benches and a graffiti-covered wall as a blue cylindrical building looms through the heavy mist. As the camera moves into a more open plaza, the fog thins slightly to reveal scattered crowds, street trees, and tall LED lights before the view is dominated by a massive concrete overpass. The scene then shifts under the cover of the overpass toward the teal neon signage of an NCART station entrance, passing piles of trash and commuting pedestrians. Finally, the camera exits the sheltered area and opens onto a sidewalk lined with palm trees, where moving traffic flows on the right and a blue neon hotel sign glows through the distant haze.
